# Memory Index

This file is read first. It points to all other memory files.

## Core files
- `you.md` — personal context, preferences, constraints
- `family.md` — partner, children, key relationships
- `projects.md` — active projects and goals
- `events.md` — upcoming dates and deadlines
- `feedback_rules.md` — permanent rules derived from past errors

## Auto-generated
- `feedback/YYYY-MM-DD.md` — daily error logs from nightly reflection
